emails.subject: Wellhead
emails.body: Wellhead Daren, Here are some monination "tweaks" due to late noms and revisions from shippers. I know your trying to finalise your position so just let me know when if or when you want to work these into the system. Four Square Meter Old New 6599 1549 1500 Suemaur Explorations 9772 860 752 1568 7 1 6844 2475 1500 C E Operations Texaco 990 1100 9813 681 670 9708 13746 13035 9736 2889 2830 Shoreline Yates 2930 3470 6722 30 570 9743 596 504 Cody 6722 7692 7450 Cima 4126 482 464 OIL Gas Title 6114 0 1 Phillips 6673 838 119

emails.subject: WELLHEAD
emails.body: WELLHEAD Shoreline has sent a revision to trim down the 6722 meter from 570 to 428. Daren I can't tell you what it flowed last month due to more than one person is at that meter. We only have 30 nominated there now. Let me know what you think. Thanks.
